description: Join Binance and Toko Crypto for a livestream discussing the TKO Launchpad, featuring insights from Colin of Binance and Kai, CEO of Toko Crypto. The event includes a Q&A session with prizes totaling $1,000 in TKO tokens.
topic_summary: The livestream covers the TKO Launchpad on Binance, with discussions in both English and Indonesian. A Q&A session will conclude the event, offering participants a chance to win TKO tokens [t=72:39].
